articles.title: Brazil Now Allows You to Transact in Tether Through 24,000 ATMs
articles.description: USDT will be available in 24,000 ATMs in Brazil from Nov. 3 to enable conversion from USDT to Brazilian reals and vice versa.

articles.title: L2 solution makes Cardano, Algorand network interoperable
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson announced that Algorand (ALGO) is now on the Cardano network in reaction to the news that Mikomedia A1 Rollup is live on Algorand.
